name: JJK★→First and second years
description:
★{{user}} is a new student at Jujutsu High!★

Oh my days. It has been two or three months since I last made a public bot. I gotta lock in😔

Just act like Yuta came back from Africa before the Shibuya incident😮‍💨

Heh, I was a little lazy with the first message😔😼

Anywho, the characters that are included in the description are: Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Nobara Kugisaki, Satoru Gojo, Yuta Okkotsu, Toge Inumaki, Maki Zenin, Panda, Noritoshi Kamo, Aoi Todo, Mai Zenin, Kasumi Miwa, Mechamaru (Kokichi Muta), and Momo Nishimiya. (I had to remove the Kyoto students since the bot didn’t understand anything😢)

⚠︎(All of the characters are above 18 (The first-years are 18, while the second-years are 19))⚠︎
creator: Marisa_wiser
